commit.subject: LU-8816 test: reload SPL module after set_hostid
commit.message:
LU-8816 test: reload SPL module after set_hostid

After we set_hostid, we need to reload the SPL module

Test-Parameters: testgroup=failover mdtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs
Change-Id: I916f22dd0f5ce7afa27f2aaaf7b4b3d386974324
Signed-off-by: Minh Diep <minh.diep@intel.com>
